description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a fenced plot featuring a lush green lawn and several mature trees, including a prominent palm and broadleaf tree. The structure has a modern, angular design with a mix of black and white exterior walls, large windows, and a flat roof. The front area includes a gated driveway with a parked car, bordered by tall hedges and ornamental plants. The backyard is spacious and open, providing ample outdoor space, while the house itself appears to have multiple rooms with visible interior partitions and colorful accents. The perimeter is enclosed by a decorative white railing, enhancing the sense of privacy and security. The overall setting suggests a comfortable, contemporary urban home with a focus on outdoor living and greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with black and white walls, large windows, a flat roof, and a gated driveway, set in a fenced plot with lush greenery and mature trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side and partial front of the bungalow, highlighting the green lawn, decorative railing, and the angular structure with large windows and visible interior spaces.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the gated driveway, parked car, tall hedges, and the prominent palm tree, emphasizing the main entrance and landscaping.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, focusing on the expansive backyard, white exterior walls, and the dense foliage of the trees.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the back of the bungalow, the open lawn, and the rear side of the house, with the decorative railing enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
